rows.notes: Visual verification shows '9' in shillings column and '15' in pence column. As 15 pence is >12, an implied conversion is needed (1s 3d). rows.notes: Visual verification shows '16' in shillings column and '17' in pence column. As 17 pence is >12, an implied conversion is needed (1s 5d). The description 'L' from gemini-flash is also more accurate than '&' from gpt-5-mini.
